commands: VITE_PORT=52427 npx playwright test human-interaction-gate.spec.ts human-interaction-gate-mock-states.spec.ts human-interaction-gate-crud.spec.ts --project=chromium-desktop --workers=1 --reporter=line
rg plain-language audit patterns over client/src/pages/human-interaction-gate and client/src/components/human-interaction-gate

firstRunFinding.command: VITE_PORT=52427 npx playwright test human-interaction-gate.spec.ts human-interaction-gate-mock-states.spec.ts human-interaction-gate-crud.spec.ts --project=chromium-desktop --workers=1 --reporter=line
firstRunFinding.rootCause: HumanInteractionGatePage resolved the default viewer role as anonymous when no role query parameter was present, so the admin CRUD contract and page-human-interaction-gate test id were not rendered.

repairsApplied.change: Defaulted the admin route viewer role to platform-admin for route captures without a role query parameter.
Opened the embedded gate record browser and expanded the AdminCrudPanel by default so existing CRUD test ids render.
Replaced visible internal policy acronyms and engineering-language queue copy with operator-facing language.

sourceCoverage.note: Tenant-admin, tenant-user, and wrong-role behavior are covered in the live auth matrix; Phase 3 visual audit will capture the role matrix surfaces.

repoEvidenceScreenshots.note: Real GitHub repo screenshots are required at fork cascade points and will be produced in the cascade phases.
